transcript.clean_text: the last parade for the 167 survivors of this 2017 toor of France since 1975 the peleton finish on the shaiz the traditional hunting ground of the sprinters on the final day the departure of today's stage from the site of the first grande part in 1903 in front of the famous Star Cafe of that day the Riders crossed the Paris region in many places that form part of the bid for the Olympic Games of 20124 as is tradition the first kilometers are reserved for celebration teammates another rides in the pelaton celebrate the fourth victory of Chris fr after 40 km at a moderate Pace the Riders finally arrive and enter Paris and ride through the streets of the capital before arriving on the Sha Alise the first Rider to cross the finish line is South African darl imp of Ora Scott he's joined by eight Riders while the rain falls at the front we find Silvan chavanel lucenko Neils pollet and Marcus bergart 10 km from the Finish and the pelaton is closing in and altogether ready for the Finish as the bell goes the aana rider Dimitri gusev tries his luck he resists for nearly 2 km the race is ignited again as stenar the check Rider of quickstep attacks with less than 5 km to go but he's finally caught 2 and A2 km from the Finish Line the sprinters team's mass at the front they are ready to unleash their men the first to launch is Kristoff but the Flying Dutchman Dylan groven of Lotto jumbo aims for the line and takes the victory Chris FR finishes safely in the pelaton to secure the 2017 Tour of France 24-year-old Dylan gragan from the Netherlands takes the biggest win of his career the former National Champion Powers across the line on the shaiz to give his Lotto El yumbo team their second win of the race and his first gr to victory yeah it's my first victory in to the front on on a perfect place it's a perfect place for sprinters yeah the team did a great job so uh they did put me on a on a good position uh then I was uh yeah in the view of Kristoff uh slid out and uh yeah I was spring on the last line and uh yeah I Ed on the Finish Line Dylan groven wins ahead of Andre GLE and edal boshen all the sprinters lined up but he had the power to lead for 400 m Chris FR wins his fourth tour to France ahead of rigoberto Iran and Roman B the top three remain the same as the time trial yesterday what a race it's been there's our final Podium FR triumphant on the Sha Alise a the winner of the 2017 Tor of France he
